# openai_project_user (Resource)

Manage a user's project membership.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "openai_project_user" "example" {
  project_id = "proj_123"
  role       = "owner"
  user_id    = "user_123"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `project_id` (String) project id
- `role` (String) role

### Optional

- `email` (String) email
- `user_id` (String) user id

### Read-Only

- `added_at` (Number) added at
- `name` (String) name
